title: Accounts integrating within 48 hours of kickoff retain at 2.3x the rate
anchor: 26 of 47 Q1 implementations connected their first integration inside the kickoff window.
connect: The remaining 21 accounts that integrated after the first week showed weaker 90-day retention patterns.
body: 26 of 47 Q1 implementations connected their first integration inside the kickoff window. The remaining 21 accounts that integrated after the first week showed weaker 90-day retention patterns.
trace: The 48-hour integration window appears to be a leading indicator of long-term account success, with a strong retention multiplier effect visible at the 90-day mark.

title: Tier-2 activation jumps from 54% to 78% inside 14 days
anchor: The mid-complexity tier cleared first value at the highest rate on record this quarter.
connect: Q4 ran at 54% for the same complexity segment and timeline.
body: The mid-complexity tier cleared first value at the highest rate on record this quarter. Q4 ran at 54% for the same complexity segment and timeline.
trace: 24-point improvement in Tier-2 activation suggests the implementation process changes are having the strongest impact in the mid-complexity segment.

title: Mid-market implementations clear go-live 6 days ahead of plan
anchor: 22 completed implementations averaged Day 45 versus the Day 51 project plan baseline.
connect: Healthcare vertical ran the fastest at 38-day median across 11 go-lives.
body: 22 completed implementations averaged Day 45 versus the Day 51 project plan baseline. Healthcare vertical ran the fastest at 38-day median across 11 go-lives.
trace: Go-live velocity acceleration across mid-market suggests process improvements are compounding, with healthcare showing the cleanest implementation patterns.

title: Enterprise configuration sign-off moved from Day 18 to Day 11
anchor: 14 enterprise implementations used the pre-kickoff template launched March 1st.
connect: 7-day acceleration in the configuration review step shortens the total implementation cycle.
body: 14 enterprise implementations used the pre-kickoff template launched March 1st. 7-day acceleration in the configuration review step shortens the total implementation cycle.
trace: The pre-kickoff configuration template is compressing the enterprise configuration stage by a full week, suggesting the template captures the right decisions upfront.

title: 3-user activation by Day 30 drives 3x stronger 90-day retention
anchor: 31 of 47 Q1 implementations crossed the multi-user threshold within the first month.
connect: Single-user activations showed weaker retention curves at the same 90-day measurement point.
body: 31 of 47 Q1 implementations crossed the multi-user threshold within the first month. Single-user activations showed weaker retention curves at the same 90-day measurement point.
trace: Multi-stakeholder activation within 30 days appears to be a strong leading indicator of account durability, with a 3x retention multiplier.

title: Data integration milestone completion rises to 71%
anchor: 38 active implementations cleared the integration step inside 10 days of kickoff this quarter.
connect: Q4 completion rate ran at 58% for the same milestone and timeline.
body: 38 active implementations cleared the integration step inside 10 days of kickoff this quarter. Q4 completion rate ran at 58% for the same milestone and timeline.
trace: 13-point improvement in integration milestone completion suggests the implementation team is getting accounts through the technical setup faster.

title: Onboarding checklist completion jumps from 22% to 34%
anchor: Configuration template launch March 1st correlates with the 12-point completion increase.
connect: 34% sits above the UserGuiding industry baseline of 19.2% for B2B SaaS onboarding.
body: Configuration template launch March 1st correlates with the 12-point completion increase. 34% sits above the UserGuiding industry baseline of 19.2% for B2B SaaS onboarding.
trace: The configuration template appears to be driving more complete onboarding checklist adoption, moving above industry baseline completion rates.

title: Stakeholder breadth at kickoff rises from 39% to 64%
anchor: 51 kickoffs this quarter listed 3 or more named stakeholders on the project plan.
connect: The prior quarter ran at 39% for multi-stakeholder kickoff coverage.
body: 51 kickoffs this quarter listed 3 or more named stakeholders on the project plan. The prior quarter ran at 39% for multi-stakeholder kickoff coverage.
trace: 25-point increase in multi-stakeholder kickoff coverage suggests improved stakeholder identification and engagement at the start of implementations.

title: Self-serve sandbox lifts Tier-1 activation from 62% to 81%
anchor: 36 Tier-1 accounts accessed the sandbox after the March 12th launch.
connect: 19-point activation lift represents the largest single-feature impact on first-value metrics.
body: 36 Tier-1 accounts accessed the sandbox after the March 12th launch. 19-point activation lift represents the largest single-feature impact on first-value metrics.
trace: The self-serve sandbox launch created the strongest single improvement in Tier-1 activation rates, letting customers explore before formal kickoff.

title: Complete use-case capture accelerates go-live by 12 days
anchor: 34 Q1 implementations with pre-close documentation reached go-live faster than accounts without one.
connect: Sales handoff quality directly impacts implementation timeline efficiency.
body: 34 Q1 implementations with pre-close documentation reached go-live faster than accounts without one. Sales handoff quality directly impacts implementation timeline efficiency.
trace: Complete use-case documentation from Sales creates a 12-day implementation cycle advantage, suggesting scope clarity at handoff is critical.

title: Mid-market implementation NPS jumps 18 points to 59
anchor: 28 surveyed go-lives this quarter recorded the largest segment-level NPS increase on record.
connect: Prior quarter mid-market NPS ran at 41 across the same survey methodology.
body: 28 surveyed go-lives this quarter recorded the largest segment-level NPS increase on record. Prior quarter mid-market NPS ran at 41 across the same survey methodology.
trace: 18-point NPS jump in mid-market implementations represents the strongest customer satisfaction improvement in implementation experience.

title: Product-blocker resolution tightens from 9 days to 4 days
anchor: 17 implementation-tagged Engineering issues cleared faster this quarter.
connect: 5-day reduction in blocker resolution directly shortens implementation cycles.
body: 17 implementation-tagged Engineering issues cleared faster this quarter. 5-day reduction in blocker resolution directly shortens implementation cycles.
trace: Faster Engineering response on implementation blockers removes a major source of go-live delays, cutting resolution time by more than half.

title: Structured handoff briefs acknowledged within 48 hours at 92%
anchor: 26 enterprise go-lives had the implementation handoff received by the CSM team on schedule.
connect: Handoff brief completion creates clean account transitions at go-live.
body: 26 enterprise go-lives had the implementation handoff received by the CSM team on schedule. Handoff brief completion creates clean account transitions at go-live.
trace: High CSM acknowledgment rate on structured handoff briefs suggests the implementation-to-ongoing-success transition is working smoothly.

title: Implementation support response drops from 6 hours to 2.4 hours
anchor: 142 implementation-tagged support tickets cleared faster after the dedicated queue launched.
connect: Dedicated implementation support queue halved the first-response timeline.
body: 142 implementation-tagged support tickets cleared faster after the dedicated queue launched. Dedicated implementation support queue halved the first-response timeline.
trace: The dedicated implementation support queue cut first-response time by more than half, improving customer experience during the onboarding phase.

title: Healthcare vertical runs 38-day median across 11 implementations
anchor: Healthcare represents the fastest segment median in the implementation portfolio.
connect: Vertical specialization appears to compress implementation cycles for this segment.
body: Healthcare represents the fastest segment median in the implementation portfolio. Vertical specialization appears to compress implementation cycles for this segment.
trace: Healthcare vertical's 38-day median suggests that vertical-specific implementation patterns and templates are driving faster go-lives.

title: Configuration template launch correlates with multiple velocity improvements
anchor: March 1st template launch preceded enterprise sign-off acceleration and checklist completion increases.
connect: Template appears to create compound effects across multiple implementation stages.
body: March 1st template launch preceded enterprise sign-off acceleration and checklist completion increases. Template appears to create compound effects across multiple implementation stages.
trace: The configuration template launch shows correlation with improvements across multiple implementation metrics, suggesting systemic process enhancement.

title: First-week integration timing separates retention outcomes
anchor: Accounts integrating after the first week showed measurably different 90-day patterns.
connect: 48-hour integration window creates a 2.3x retention multiplier at the 90-day mark.
body: Accounts integrating after the first week showed measurably different 90-day patterns. 48-hour integration window creates a 2.3x retention multiplier at the 90-day mark.
trace: Integration timing within the first 48 hours appears to be a critical success factor with measurable impact on long-term account retention.

title: Multi-stakeholder implementations outperform single-user activations
anchor: 31 of 47 accounts crossed 3-user threshold by Day 30 with stronger retention curves.
connect: Stakeholder breadth at kickoff rose to 64% this quarter from 39% previously.
body: 31 of 47 accounts crossed 3-user threshold by Day 30 with stronger retention curves. Stakeholder breadth at kickoff rose to 64% this quarter from 39% previously.
trace: Multi-stakeholder engagement both at kickoff and within 30 days correlates with better long-term account outcomes, suggesting adoption breadth drives retention.

title: Tier-1 sandbox access drives 19-point activation improvement
anchor: 36 Tier-1 accounts used self-serve exploration after March 12th launch.
connect: Pre-kickoff sandbox access lets customers start configuration discovery independently.
body: 36 Tier-1 accounts used self-serve exploration after March 12th launch. Pre-kickoff sandbox access lets customers start configuration discovery independently.
trace: Self-serve sandbox creates the largest single-feature impact on Tier-1 activation by enabling customer exploration before formal implementation begins.

title: Implementation improvements compound across complexity tiers
anchor: Tier-2 activation, enterprise configuration, and Tier-1 sandbox all accelerated this quarter.
connect: Process enhancements appear to lift performance across all implementation segments.
body: Tier-2 activation, enterprise configuration, and Tier-1 sandbox all accelerated this quarter. Process enhancements appear to lift performance across all implementation segments.
trace: Implementation velocity improvements show up across all complexity tiers this quarter, suggesting systematic process enhancements rather than segment-specific changes.
